entities.name: COWPEA-GROUP RHIZOBIUM
entities.description: Population of Rhizobium associated with cowpea found in soils of semiarid tropics

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where fields were sampled

entities.name: MPN METHOD
entities.description: Most Probable Number method used to estimate Rhizobium populations

entities.name: SIRATRO
entities.description: Macropulium atropurpureum, used as a host plant for the MPN method

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil where Rhizobium populations were more consistent

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil where Rhizobium populations showed higher variability

entities.name: PADDY FIELDS
entities.description: Agricultural fields for rice where Rhizobium numbers were very low

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Crop used as a host for the MPN method

entities.name: ICP-7332
entities.description: A small seeded cultivar of pigeonpea used in the MPN method

entities.name: ICP-1
entities.description: A medium sized cultivar of pigeonpea used in the MPN method

entities.name: SMALL SEEDED
entities.description: Seed size characteristic of pigeonpea cultivar ICP-7332

entities.name: MEDIUM SIZED
entities.description: Seed size characteristic of pigeonpea cultivar ICP-1

entities.name: DEPTH
entities.description: The vertical distance in soil, which inversely affected Rhizobium population
